plan.command: dynadot-api-tool --output json --plan-out plan.json api3 place-auction-bid --domain example.com --bid-amount 100 --currency usd
preconditions: plan baseline must match current inputs

rollback.notes: Most Dynadot writes are not safely auto-reversible.

verification_plan.notes: Apply requires explicit no-snapshot approval before Dynadot HTTP when no useful before-state can be saved.

before_state.reason: Refused: missing explicit no-snapshot approval for a Dynadot write with no reliable before-state snapshot. Review the dry-run plan, then rerun with --ack-no-snapshot if you approve applying without a snapshot.
before_state.notes: No reliable before-state snapshot is available in this example. Approved apply may continue after explicit no-snapshot approval.
